provenance.name: tonylukasavage/cv2r
provenance.note: Extracted from cv2r build-time metadata so this guide repository does not need to vendor the full randomizer project.

requirements.standard: (HOLY_WATER || NAIL) && WHITE_CRYSTAL && BLUE_CRYSTAL && RED_CRYSTAL && OAK_STAKE && LAURELS
